history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward to row 02 column C is safe, while the lava cells are at row 03 column C and row 04 column C, so I should stay on the top path and advance right first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column D is a safe floor cell (`.`). Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me is row 02 column E, which is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 04 column D, so I should turn to face down toward the goal. Turning right from facing right will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column D is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward brings me closer while avoiding the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 04 column D, which is the goal and is safe to enter. The best action is to move forward into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
